steps.title: Scale the second equation
steps.content:
Multiply the second equation by $3$ so the $x$-coefficients match:
$$
3(3x+3y)=3(18)
$$
$$
9x+9y=54
$$

steps.title: Subtract to isolate y
steps.content: Subtract the scaled equation from the first equation: $$ (9x+10y)-(9x+9y)=50-54 $$ $$ y=-4 $$ The answer is A.
